# Backlog Item: BI-260058 - Account-Settings Surface and Identity Overview

- **Date**: 2026-06-23
- **Status**: Done
- **Slice**: S2 (account management)
- **Ready since**: 2026-06-25 — S1 complete (provides the `me` document + server logout); D-15
  resolved (new account-settings module replaces AdminPlaceholder).

## Description

Introduce a new `account-settings` feature module (replacing `AdminPlaceholder`) routed from a shell
user menu, and render the identity overview from `me { username email emailVerified authMethods }`. This
is the home that subsequent S2 actions (BI-260059/060) attach to.

## Goals

- New `src/features/account-settings/` module + route; remove/replace `src/features/admin/AdminPlaceholder.tsx`.
- Shell user menu entry to open settings; Logout co-located.
- Identity overview reads `me` and shows username, email, verification status, linked methods.

## Acceptance Criteria

- A signed-in user can open account settings and see their `me` details.
- The admin placeholder is replaced without breaking shell routing or architecture boundary tests.

## Non-goals

- The mutating actions (set/unlink/link/email/delete) land in BI-260059/060.

## Dependencies

- BI-260054 (`me` document, mapper); S1 complete.

## Validation Approach

- Unit: module render from `me`, routing, user-menu entry.
- Architecture: dependency-direction and route-boundary tests updated for the new module; the existing
  **admin-placeholder scope assertions from BI-260014** (`architecture.test.ts`) must be updated/retired
  to reflect the replacement, without weakening unrelated boundary checks.
- Quality gates: lint, typecheck, test, test:e2e.
- **Coverage: 100% line + branch on the new module (REQ-QR-260008).**

## Related Artifacts

- **ADR**: ADR-260058, ADR-260017
- **Requirements**: REQ-FR-260067

## Done Evidence Block

- New module `src/features/account-settings/` (100% line/branch/func/stmt — json-summary verified):
  - `use-account-info.ts` — fetches `me` (username/email/emailVerified/authMethods); generic error on
    failure (session expiry handled globally by the Apollo error link).
  - `AccountSettingsPanel.tsx` — modal identity overview: `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal`, labelled
    close, Escape-to-close, backdrop-close; verified/unverified badge (text + colour, not colour-alone).
  - `account-settings.css` (brand tokens), `index.ts` barrel.
- Wiring: `ui-shell/WorkspaceShell.tsx` — header **Account** button opens the modal; Logout co-located
  in the same header cluster.
- Removed the dead `src/features/admin/` placeholder (it was never rendered — no routing exists).
- Architecture tests updated (sanctioned by this BI's acceptance): `FEATURE_MODULES` and
  `EXPECTED_BARRELS` swapped admin → account-settings; obsolete admin-placeholder assertions dropped;
  the placeholder-trust requirement (REQ-CR-260009) **repointed** to the remaining fallback screens
  (StartupErrorScreen/SchemaErrorScreen honest-messaging check) so its coverage isn't lost; the
  "isolated seam" test now targets account-settings.
- Commands: `npm run lint` → 0; `npm run typecheck` → 0; `npm run test` → 0 (782 passing, 46 files);
  `npm run test:coverage` → new modules 100% (per-file branch via json-summary, now in vitest config);
  `npm run test:e2e` → 42 passed.
- Known a11y simplification (deliberate, consistent with the existing creation-panel modal): no
  focus-trap / focus-on-open. **Tracked as BI-260064** (shared modal-focus utility for the
  account-settings + atom-creation modals) — filed per the BI-260058 review rather than left in prose.
- Post-review polish (BI-260058 review): the dialog now uses `aria-labelledby` pointed at the `<h2>`
  title instead of a duplicate `aria-label` (accessible name unchanged); review findings #1 (focus
  management) and #2 (Escape overlapping the canvas handler) are folded into BI-260064.
- Non-goals (per BI): the mutating actions (set/unlink/link method, email change, delete) land in
  BI-260059 / BI-260060.
- Rollback: revert the listed files + restore the admin placeholder; the Account button disappears.
